name: com.towneh.adaptivelightvolumes
description: Movable point, spot, and area lights with pre-baked 3D occlusion volumes for Unity 6.4+. Designed as the dynamic-light counterpart to Unity's Adaptive Probe Volumes: bake static-scene visibility once per light into a Texture3D, then sample the volume per-fragment at runtime for free shadowing on many cheap lights without per-frame shadow maps.
